observations.title: canceled/ の git tracking 戦略が design へ委任されている
observations.rationale: 要件 5 で「退避先を main へ commit するか untracked で置くかは design が決める」と明示されており、実装者への出発点として design.md に archive/ と同様の commit 案と untracked 案の両方を検討するよう記載することを推奨。

observations.title: cancelAllTerminated と canceled/ フォルダの関係が未言及
observations.rationale: cancelAllTerminated は .specrunner/local/<slug>/ のサイドカーのみ削除する。canceled/<slug>-<jobId8>/ は対象外だが request 本文に明示がない。意図的であればスコープ外セクションに一行追記すると実装者が迷わない。

findings.title: T-04: null return from evacuateChangeFolder not explicitly handled for persist step
findings.rationale: T-03 says 'warn and return safely' when slug is empty, but does not specify the return type (null/undefined). T-04 then passes the result as `canceledDirAbs` to `new JobStateStore(..., { changeDir: canceledDirAbs })`. If changeDir is null/undefined, JobStateStore.getStateJsonPath() throws (requires slug+stateRoot or changeDir). T-04 should explicitly state: if evacuateChangeFolder returns null, skip the canceled persist step as well.

findings.title: T-06: cancelAllTerminated worktree detection dependency not documented
findings.rationale: T-06 refactors makeJob to write state into a worktree-only layout. JobStateStore.list() detects worktrees by scanning <repoRoot>/.git/specrunner-worktrees/. For cancelAllTerminated tests to keep finding jobs, makeJob's worktreeDir must be buildWorktreePath(tempDir, slug, jobId) (which resolves to tempDir/.git/specrunner-worktrees/<slug>-<jobId8>). This dependency is implicit and should be documented in T-06 to prevent implementers from using an arbitrary temp path that list() cannot discover.

observations.title: changeDir seam already exists — no new API needed for D3
observations.rationale: JobStateStore constructor already accepts opts.changeDir (line 156-162), and getStateJsonPath()/getEventsPath() already prioritize changeDir over slug-convention paths (lines 168-194). D3's implementation requires no new interface additions.

observations.title: D7 archive-skip target line confirmed — one-line change
observations.rationale: The skip condition `entry.name === 'archive'` is at line 225. Adding `|| entry.name === 'canceled'` is the complete change required for D7.

message: spec-review iteration 1 completed with verdict: approved
